item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses opening another transfer channel as the default next local repair, names the three prior downstream split patches plus the new requested split, reframes the repeated mechanism as proliferating local routing structures, and moves upstream to unified intake/routing ownership rules and consolidation before considering any new channel.
